execution_context.purpose: Use to replace template parameters in the format: '{{context_param_name}}',' in document templates with actual values during execution.

context_param.name: schemas
context_param.purpose: Path to the folder containing schema definitions.

context_param.name: templates
context_param.purpose: Path to the folder containing template files.

context_param.name: ceremony_execution_folder
context_param.purpose: Default workspace for all work-related artifacts during ceremony step execution. Output files without an explicit path prefix are written relative to this folder.

context_param.name: execution_id
context_param.purpose: Unique execution identifier (GUID) for lineage tracking. Use when replacing {{execution_id}} template parameters in document templates. This value is recorded in the step envelope for traceability.

context_param.name: session_id
context_param.purpose: Unique session identifier (GUID) for this ceremony step execution session.

context_param.name: current_utc_datetime
context_param.purpose: Session start UTC datetime. Use this value when populating date/datetime fields in generated outputs (e.g. analyzed_at) in document template template parameters.
